scripts.prisma:migrate:local: prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script | wrangler d1 execute ei_report_bot_db --local --file -
scripts.prisma:migrate:prod: prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script | wrangler d1 execute ei_report_bot_db --remote --file -
